tasks.desktop:build:exe: deno desktop --allow-ffi --allow-env=SystemRoot,USERNAME --include app/index.html --include app/styles.css --include app/app.js --include app/impactGraph.js --include src/domain/dateLogic.js --include src/domain/holidayLogic.js --include src/domain/impactGraph.js --include src/storage/localStore.js --include src/storage/impactGraphStore.js --output out/TodoDesktop.exe desktop/main.ts
tasks.desktop:build:msi: deno desktop --allow-ffi --allow-env=SystemRoot,USERNAME --include app/index.html --include app/styles.css --include app/app.js --include app/impactGraph.js --include src/domain/dateLogic.js --include src/domain/holidayLogic.js --include src/domain/impactGraph.js --include src/storage/localStore.js --include src/storage/impactGraphStore.js --output out/TodoDesktop.msi desktop/main.ts
